tournament.name: MTG SEA Championship Final 2025-26 - Oracle Events

decks.notes: This deck focuses on aggressive plays using creatures like Ashling, Flamebraider, and Roaming Throne to deal damage quickly. Spells like Burst Lightning and Ill-Timed Explosion add extra burn to finish off opponents. Deceit and Wistfulness help control the board and protect your creatures. The deck aims to overwhelm opponents with fast damage output while maintaining board presence with cards like Sunderflock and Vibrance. Cavern of Souls ensures your creatures can't be countered, giving you an edge against control decks. Overall, the deck aims to be fast, aggressive, and efficient in dealing damage.

The main concept of this deck is to utilize a combination of cards that allow for a powerful reanimator strategy. By using cards like Deceit and Superior Spider-Man to manipulate the graveyard and bring back strong creatures like Doomsday Excruciator and Harvester of Misery, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with powerful creatures. Supporting cards like Requiting Hex and Bitter Triumph provide additional value and control options, while the inclusion of various spells and lands help to ensure the deck can function efficiently and consistently in a 1 vs 1 format.

This Golgari Aggro deck focuses on deploying aggressive creatures like Kona, Rescue Beastie and Vaultborn Tyrant, supported by mana acceleration from Llanowar Elves. The deck also includes powerful finishers like Overlord of the Balemurk and Ghalta, Stampede Tyrant. In addition, it disrupts opponents with Duress and utilizes removal spells like Bitter Triumph and Zuko's Conviction. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with efficient creatures and disruption, while also being able to close out games with its powerful creatures and spells.

This deck focuses on quickly filling the graveyard with powerful creatures and then bringing them back into play for devastating combos. It utilizes cards like Deceit to manipulate the graveyard, Quantum Riddler to draw cards, and Superior Spider-Man for control. Cards like Ashling, Rekindled and Overlord of the Balemurk provide strong reanimation targets, while Ill-Timed Explosion and Requiting Hex help clear the way for attacking. The land base is designed to support the deck's color requirements and ensure consistency in casting spells. Overall, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with powerful creatures and strategic plays.

This Boros Aggro deck focuses on quickly deploying creatures with flying to deal damage directly to the opponent. By utilizing cards such as Haliya, Guided by Light and Momo, Friendly Flier, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with aggression before they have a chance to stabilize. The inclusion of cards like Burst Lightning and Seam Rip provide additional reach and removal options, while Springleaf Drum helps to accelerate the deck's mana. Overall, this deck aims to apply constant pressure and win the game before the opponent can establish their own game plan.

The main focus of this Boros Aggro deck is to quickly establish board presence with efficient creatures like Haliya and Nova Hellkite, backed up by cards like Burst Lightning and Seam Rip for removal and disruption. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a flurry of flying creatures and pump spells, supported by mana acceleration from cards like Springleaf Drum. With a mix of aggression and resilience provided by cards like Starfield Shepherd and Sage of the Skies, the deck looks to close out games swiftly and decisively.

The main focus of this deck is to control the game through a combination of powerful control spells and card draw. Using cards like Gran-Gran and Abandon Attachments to remove threats, while also maintaining card advantage through spells like Accumulate Wisdom and Artist's Talent. The deck also has access to powerful burn spells like Combustion Technique and Burst Lightning to close out the game. With a mix of counterspells, removal, and card draw, the deck aims to outvalue and outlast opponents in a 1 vs 1 match.

The deck focuses on generating quick and aggressive plays by utilizing powerful creatures like Ashling, Rekindled and Flamebraider. Additional support comes from cards like Deceit and Vibrance to further enhance the tempo of the game. Sunderflock and Roaming Throne provide more control options, while spells like Bounce Off and Thunder Magic offer removal and damage potential. The mana base is designed to support the aggressive strategy with a mix of land types and dual lands. Overall, the deck aims to overwhelm opponents with fast, powerful threats while maintaining flexibility and control options.

The deck focuses on playing aggressive Azorius creatures like Aven Interrupter and Floodpits Drowner to quickly overwhelm the opponent. It includes cards like Voice of Victory and Avatar's Wrath to maintain board control and deal with threats. Additional cards like Spell Snare and Get Lost provide disruption and control options. Wan Shi Tong, Librarian serves as a powerful late-game threat. The mana base is designed to support the aggressive playstyle with a mix of Plains, Floodfarm Verge, Hallowed Fountain, and other lands to ensure consistent mana sources.

The main concept of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent quickly with aggressive creatures and powerful spells. By utilizing cards like Fear of Missing Out, Wildfire Wickerfolk, and Patchwork Beastie, the deck aims to apply pressure early and maintain a strong board presence. Supporting cards such as Violent Urge and Burst Lightning provide additional removal and reach, while cards like Keen-Eyed Curator and Tersa Lightshatter offer card advantage and resilience. The mana base ensures consistency and flexibility, allowing the deck to adapt to different situations and opponents. The strategy is to be proactive and relentless in attacking the opponent.

The main focus of this deck is to control the game using a combination of removal spells, counter spells, and card draw to outvalue your opponent. By utilizing cards like Gran-Gran and Monument to Endurance to generate card advantage, along with Abandon Attachments and Accumulate Wisdom to disrupt your opponent's strategy, you can stay ahead in the game. Combustion Technique and Firebending Lesson provide removal options, while Boomerang Basics and Stormchaser's Talent help maintain control of the board. Overall, this deck aims to stall the game until you can overwhelm your opponent with sheer card advantage and powerful spells.

This deck focuses on quickly overwhelming the opponent with aggressive creatures and spells. The key strategy is to play low-cost creatures like Elusive Otter and Slickshot Show-Off, while using spells like Burst Lightning and Boomerang Basics to control the board. Drake Hatcher and Hearth Elemental provide additional threats, while cards like Opt and Sleight of Hand help maintain card advantage. The mana base is designed to provide the right colors of mana efficiently, allowing for maximum flexibility in casting spells. Overall, the deck aims to be fast and disruptive, putting pressure on the opponent from the start.

This deck focuses on aggressive tactics with a mix of creatures and instant spells to pressure the opponent early on. It utilizes cards like Elusive Otter and Slickshot Show-Off to maintain board presence while also using burst damage spells like Burst Lightning to quickly finish off the opponent. The deck also includes card draw and selection spells like Opt and Sleight of Hand to ensure consistency in drawing needed cards. The mana base includes a combination of Islands, Riverpyre Verge, Spirebluff Canal, and Steam Vents to support the blue and red color requirements of the deck.

The main concept of the deck is to overwhelm the opponent with early aggression and efficient creatures, focusing on ramping up mana with cards like Llanowar Elves and Sapling Nursery. The deck utilizes the synergy of Earthbender Ascension and cards like Mightform Harmonizer to quickly build a strong board presence. Additionally, the deck includes a mix of powerful creatures like Badgermole Cub and Sazh's Chocobo to provide versatility and flexibility in combat. The deck also includes land manipulation cards like Ba Sing Se and Escape Tunnel to ensure consistent access to mana sources.

The main concept of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent with fast and aggressive creatures while utilizing mana acceleration from cards like Llanowar Elves and Earthbender Ascension. The deck also includes cards like Mightform Harmonizer and Archdruid's Charm to boost the power of the creatures and create an even bigger threat on the board. Escape Tunnel and Fabled Passage provide mana fixing and card advantage, while other cards like Sapling Nursery and Promising Vein add resilience and longevity to the deck. The focus is on early game aggression and maintaining board presence to quickly secure the win.

The main focus of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent with a fast and aggressive playstyle using creatures with efficient stats and abilities. It also utilizes ramp cards like Llanowar Elves to accelerate the mana curve and play high-cost threats earlier. Cards like Mightform Harmonizer and Earthbender Ascension provide additional power and toughness boosts to the creatures on the battlefield. The deck has an emphasis on creatures with strong synergies and efficient mana usage to maintain pressure on the opponent and secure victories quickly.
